pi_items.source: ISO 4217 standard; https://www.ecb.europa.eu/press/pr/date/1997/html/pr970425.en.html confirms EUR as the official code for Euro
ISO 4217 standard; https://www.iban.com/currency-codes confirms USD as the official code for US Dollar
iDempiere Currency Rate Window (ID-116) documentation at https://wiki.idempiere.org/en/Currency_Rate_(Window_ID-116) documents 'Spot' as one of the available Currency Type options

Historical EUR/USD exchange rates; https://www.exchange-rates.org/exchange-rate-history/eur-usd-2025 shows rates of 1.0835 (March 7), 1.0837 (March 10), and 1.0852 (March 13, 2025) - the claimed 1.085 matches the actual 2025 data within 0.001 tolerance
Verification parameter; reasonable tolerance for currency rate comparisons
Calendar; January 1, 2025 is the first day of the year and a valid date
Calendar; December 31, 2025 is the last day of the year and a valid date

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on real iDempiere ERP system data with verified currency codes: EUR (Euro) and USD (US Dollar) are both official ISO 4217 standard codes. The 'Spot' conversion type is a documented conversion rate type in iDempiere's Currency Rate window. The multiply rate of 1.085 matches historical EUR/USD exchange rate data from March 2025, when rates ranged from 1.0835-1.0852. The date range 2025-01-01 to 2025-12-31 covers the full year 2025. The GardenWorld client is a standard demo client in iDempiere installations. All metadata claims are factually accurate and based on real data.
